hero.subtitle: A metal detecting app for Android. Your GPS path draws on the map as you walk. Log every find with photo, depth, and your machine's settings. Overlay century-old USGS maps. Offline maps included.
mapcompare.label: Old-Map Overlay
mapcompare.description: Slide between today's satellite view and the century-old USGS survey beneath it. Old homesteads, schoolhouses, and wagon roads that appeared on the historical map but not on current maps become visible.
howitworks.label: How it works
howitworks.description: SweepTrack covers the full detecting day: planning the trip, recording the session, and keeping the results.
howitworks.step1_description: Check the Detecting Forecast for soil moisture, wind, and the daily score. Use the USGS historical overlay to spot old homesteads and structures, then drop a waypoint on the spot you want to detect.
howitworks.step2_description: Your GPS path draws on the map as you walk, so covered ground stays visible. Perimeter Guard vibrates near the boundary you set. Pin each find with photo, depth, and your machine's settings.
howitworks.step3_description: Overlay past sessions on one map to see uncovered ground. View session stats, generate a share card, and save an encrypted backup to Google Drive.
features.label: Features
features.description: GPS tracking, find logging, permission management, offline maps, and session analytics in one Android app.
features.gps_description: Real-time GPS path on the live map with distance, speed, heading, and altitude. Past coverage stays drawn so uncovered ground is visible at a glance.
features.heatmap_description: Density overlay of the GPS path for the current session. Green areas indicate light coverage; red areas indicate concentrated coverage.
features.oldmap_description: USGS historical topographic tiles layered onto modern satellite imagery. Reveals roads, homesteads, and buildings that may no longer appear on current maps. Opacity is adjustable.
features.presets_description: 60+ detector presets across 12 brands, including Minelab, XP, Nokta, Garrett, and Fisher. Load any preset in one tap. A Custom slot allows user-defined settings.
features.offline_description: Download map tiles for use without a cellular connection. Four sources: Street, Satellite, Terrain, and USGS Historical Topo.
features.perimeter_description: Draw the boundary of a permitted area on the map. The phone vibrates when you approach the edge and alarms when you cross it.
features.analytics_description: Per-session metrics for distance, duration, find count, and averages. Personal bests across all sessions.
features.export_description: Export sessions as GPX, KML, CSV, or SweepTrack JSON. Compatible with Google Earth and other GIS tools.
features.weather_description: The Detecting Forecast combines soil moisture, wind, temperature, and humidity into a 0-100 Detecting Score with a 7-day outlook. NOAA tide tables show 3, 7, or 14 day ranges from the nearest station.
features.compare_description: Compare 2 to 5 past sessions in overlay mode with a blend slider, or in split-screen side by side. Uncovered areas are visible at a glance.
features.backup_description: One-tap Google Drive backup of every session, find, preset, and permission. Restore on any device.
faq.label: FAQ
faq.q1: How does the Permission Vault keep me from trespassing?
faq.a1: Each landowner permission stores name, contact, approval status, expiry date, and the site boundary drawn on the map. The Vault shows which permissions are active, expiring, or expired. A PDF permission letter can be generated for any landowner, and expiry dates can be added to the phone's calendar with one tap. Combined with Perimeter Guard, the phone vibrates near the boundary edge and plays an audio alarm when it is crossed.
faq.q2: How do historical maps help me find better spots?
faq.a2: The app overlays genuine USGS historical topographic tiles onto modern satellite imagery. Old homesteads, schools, churches, roads, and settlements that may no longer appear on current maps become visible on the historical layer. Those locations often produce finds because they were inhabited; many are now undeveloped ground. Opacity is adjustable to blend the two layers. Coverage is best across the United States.
faq.q3: What does the Detecting Forecast actually measure?
faq.a3: The Detecting Forecast pulls weather data and generates a 0-100 Detecting Score with a verdict: Excellent, Good, Fair, Poor, or Bad. The score factors in soil moisture (wet soil conducts target signals deeper), wind speed, temperature, humidity, and precipitation. Available for any location, up to seven days ahead. Tips explain why conditions favor or hinder detection.
faq.q4: How do I know if I've already covered an area?
faq.a4: Three ways. The Coverage Heatmap renders a color-coded density overlay of the current session: green indicates light coverage, red indicates concentrated coverage, blank indicates none. Track Overlay loads past sessions onto the live map so previously covered ground is visible. Session Comparison stacks 2 to 5 visits to the same area to highlight uncovered ground.
faq.q5: What does the Measure tool do?
faq.a5: Tap the map to drop points and measure distance along a path with per-segment labels. Tap point 1 again to close the path into a polygon. Perimeter and area are calculated in hectares or acres using spherical geometry. Vertices are draggable, measurements can be saved to the Library with a reverse-geocoded name, and any polygon converts to a Perimeter Guard boundary in one tap.
faq.a6: Tap the Find button to drop a GPS-pinned marker. Free logging covers the type (one of 6: Treasure, Gold, Coin, Relic, Jewelry, Trash), a name, notes, and one photo. Pro adds the full record: value, depth on a 0–40 cm slider, weight, signal/VDI, soil type, audio notes, video, and multiple photos. Every field is editable later. The Media Gallery groups photos, videos, and audio by session, and Find Search filters across sessions by name, type, or notes.
faq.q7: Does the app support my specific detector?
faq.a7: SweepTrack Pro is a GPS tracker and field toolkit, not a detector controller. It works alongside any metal detector. The app includes 60+ preset templates across 12 brands (Minelab, XP, Nokta, Garrett, Fisher, Teknetics, Bounty Hunter, Quest, White's, Tesoro, Detech, Rutus) plus a Custom slot for user-defined settings. Up to 10 configurations can be saved and shared via JSON export or QR code.
faq.q8: What's the difference between Free and Pro?
faq.a8: Free covers the basics: GPS tracking on all 3 base map types (Street, Satellite, Terrain), 10 recorded sessions a month, basic find logging (type, name, notes, and one photo), 5 waypoints, 1 detector preset, 1 Permission Vault entry, 3 themes (Tactical, Amber, Cobalt), and core field tools (compass, ruler, measure). Pro removes the limits and unlocks the recurring, high-value parts of detecting: unlimited sessions, the full find record (value, depth, weight, signal/VDI, soil type, audio, video, and multiple photos), unlimited waypoints and presets, Finds Intelligence, your own map overlays, the USGS Historical Topo layer, offline maps, Track Overlay, Coverage Heatmap, session comparison, Perimeter Guard, the 7-day Detecting Forecast, NOAA tide tables, advanced statistics, Cloud Backup, Night Vision, all 12 themes, and full GPX/KML/CSV/JSON export. Pricing: $19.99/year or $3.49/month with a 14-day free trial.
faq.q9: Does it work when I have no cell service?
faq.a9: Yes. Download map tiles in advance. Street, Satellite, Terrain, and USGS Historical Topo are all available for offline use. GPS tracking runs on the phone's hardware and requires no internet connection. The features that do require a connection are the Detecting Forecast, NOAA tide tables, and Radar live positioning.
faq.q10: Is my detecting data private and safe?
faq.a10: All data is stored on the device. No servers, no analytics, no ads, no third-party tracking. The optional Google Drive backup writes an encrypted copy to the user's own Google Drive account; SweepTrack Pro has no access to that data. Export to GPX, KML, CSV, or SweepTrack JSON is available at any time.
pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.heading_accent: Pro for the full feature set.
pricing.description: The free app tracks your detecting. Pro tells you where to dig next, with unlimited sessions and the full toolkit.
pricing.free_description: Core GPS tracking with 10 sessions a month, basic find logging, 5 waypoints, 1 detector preset, and 3 themes. Compass, ruler, and measure tool included.
pricing.pro_description: Unlimited sessions and the full find record, plus Finds Intelligence, your own map overlays, the USGS historical layer, Perimeter Guard, the 7-day forecast, and every export format.
cta.label: Launch
cta.description: SweepTrack Pro launches on Google Play soon. The launch list gets the link first, plus first access to the 1,000 Founder's Lifetime spots.
community.description: One email when SweepTrack Pro launches, with the Founder's Lifetime link before it's public.
community.newsletter_description: Email notifications when SweepTrack Pro launches and on major updates.
community.facebook_desc: Detectorists sharing finds, tips, and SweepTrack Pro setups.
community.reddit_desc: r/metaldetecting discussions, find IDs, and app feedback.
footer.description: GPS tracking, offline maps, cloud backup, and 45+ tools for metal detectorists.
blog.title: Guides & Tips
blog.subtitle: {count} articles covering every feature and technique.
blog.cta_beginners: Additional guides are added regularly. Beginners can start with
comingsoon.privacy_note: Email only. Used to send the launch link. Unsubscribe in one click.
comingsoon.error: Something went wrong. Tap to retry.
foundernote.quote: I'm a detectorist and a designer, fifteen years on logos and brand identities. Coding is my off-hours hobby; I build Android apps with Claude. I wanted one made for detecting, not a hiking tracker with a new coat of paint. So I started building it. Figured if I like using it, someone else might too.
showcase.label: Featured Tools
showcase.description: Detecting Forecast, offline maps, Waypoints, detector presets, permission management, and cloud backup.
showcase.forecast_description: 0-100 Detecting Score derived from soil moisture, wind, temperature, and precipitation forecasts. Available for any location, up to seven days ahead.
showcase.offline_description: Download map tiles for offline use in four sources: Street, Satellite, Terrain, and USGS Historical Topo. Tiles are stored on device; no cellular connection required.
showcase.presets_description: Built-in templates for 60+ detector models across 12 brands. Up to 10 custom configurations can be stored and shared via JSON or QR code.
showcase.permission_description: Track landowner permissions with approval status, expiry alerts to your phone's calendar, boundary maps, and PDF permission letter generation.
showcase.backup_description: One-tap Google Drive backup of all sessions, finds, presets, permissions, and settings. Restore to any Android device.
featuresall.label: All features
featuresall.heading_prefix: And the other 40+ tools in the
featuresall.description: Every feature listed here ships in the app today. Pick a category and browse.
featuresall.gps_description: Real-time satellite map with distance, speed, heading, and altitude. Three map types (Street, Satellite, Terrain) plus a USGS Historical Topo overlay (Pro).
featuresall.cloud_description: One-tap Google Drive backup of all sessions, finds, presets, permissions, and settings. Restore on any device.
featuresall.track_subtitle: Load past tracks on your live map
featuresall.track_description: Load past sessions onto the live map to see areas already covered. Each track is rendered in its own color so uncovered ground stays visible.
featuresall.track_bullet1: 6 path colors: Neon Green, Pink, Slate Blue, Orange, Gold, White
featuresall.track_bullet3: See uncovered ground at a glance
featuresall.perimeter_description: Draw a boundary polygon on the map. The phone vibrates when you approach the edge and plays an audio alarm when you cross it.
featuresall.perimeter_bullet1: Draw custom boundary polygons on map
featuresall.measure_description: Tap the map or drop a point at the current GPS position to lay out a line. Tap point 1 again to close it into a polygon. Perimeter and area are calculated in hectares or acres using spherical geometry. Drag any vertex to edit, tap a segment to insert a point, and undo or clear without leaving the map.
featuresall.saveguard_description: Save any measurement to the Library with a reverse-geocoded location name, or convert the drawn polygon to a Perimeter Guard in one tap. The measured shape becomes the haptic and audio boundary for the next session.
featuresall.saveguard_bullet5: Audio alarm when outside the zone
featuresall.permission_description: Track landowner permissions with approval status, expiry alerts to your calendar, site boundaries, and automatic PDF permission letters.
featuresall.oldmap_description: Overlay genuine USGS historical topographic tiles onto modern satellite imagery. Reveals old roads, buildings, and settlements that may not appear on current maps.
featuresall.offline_description: Download map tiles for offline use. Four sources: Street, Satellite, Terrain, and USGS Historical Topo. Works without a cellular connection.
featuresall.sec_findlogger_title: Find Logger with Photo, Video & Audio
featuresall.sec_findlogger_desc: Log a find with name, one of 6 types (Treasure, Gold, Coin, Relic, Jewelry, Trash), notes, and a photo for free. Pro adds the full record: depth (0–40 cm), value, weight, signal/VDI, soil type, video, audio, and multiple photos.
featuresall.sec_pindrop_desc: One tap drops a find pin at your current GPS position. Fill in the details later from the Finds list.
featuresall.sec_backtostart_desc: Toggle a line from the current GPS position to the session start. The compass overlay adds a return-bearing arrow.
featuresall.sec_sessioncompare_desc: Pick past sessions and compare them in overlay mode with a blend slider, or in split view side by side.
featuresall.sec_presetslots_desc: Save up to 10 custom detector configurations and tap to activate. JSON import and export for sharing with friends.
featuresall.sec_export_desc: Export any session individually or in batch as GPX, KML, CSV, or SweepTrack JSON. Share or save to Downloads.
featuresall.sec_nightvision_desc: One-tap red monochromatic override on top of any theme. Preserves dark adaptation for dawn and dusk sessions.
featuresall.sec_compass_desc: Rotating compass dial with degrees, cardinal directions, and an optional green return-bearing arrow pointing back to your session start.
featuresall.sec_ruler_desc: 10 cm or 4 inch ruler along the screen edge with a 70-130% calibration slider so markings match your phone's real DPI.
featuresall.sec_forecast_desc: 0-100 Detecting Score for any location, up to seven days ahead. Includes soil moisture, wind, temperature, humidity, and condition-based tips.
featuresall.sec_tidetable_desc: Tide predictions from the nearest NOAA station. Pick 3, 7, or 14 day ranges. High/low times and heights grouped by day.
featuresall.sec_waypoints_desc: Drop named pins on the map. Long-press anywhere, or save your current spot. 11 color-coded categories (old well, foundation, homestead, church, investigate later, and more), with notes, distance and bearing to each, and GPX, KML, or CSV export. Free includes 5; Pro is unlimited.
featuresall.sec_heatmap_desc: Density overlay of the current session's GPS path. Color indicates coverage intensity; uncovered areas remain blank.
featuresall.sec_careerstats_desc: Filter by 1mo / 3mo / 6mo / 1yr / all-time. Sessions, finds, distance, duration, averages, personal bests, and a Top Sessions ranked list.
featuresall.sec_permissionletter_desc: Fill in your name and pick a permission entry. The app drafts a permission request letter to the landowner that you can copy or share.
featuresall.sec_sharecard_desc: Generate a shareable PNG session card with path preview, stats, and find breakdown.
featuresall.sec_summaryscore_desc: Every session ends with an animated 0-to-score counter, path preview, and the weather snapshot captured during the session.
featuresall.sec_colorpins_desc: Find markers are color-coded by type on the map: Treasure (amber), Gold (yellow), Coin (blue), Relic (brown), Jewelry (magenta), Trash (grey).
featuresall.sec_sessionmerge_desc: Select multiple sessions in the History screen and merge them into a single unified record with combined stats.
featuresall.sec_findsearch_desc: Text search across every find you've logged by name, notes, type, or session. Filter chips for all 6 find types.
featuresall.sec_elevation_desc: Per-session terrain chart with min, max, range, ascent, descent, and average elevation in meters or feet.
featuresall.sec_permitreminders_desc: Add any permission's expiry date to your phone's calendar with one tap from the Permission Vault.
featuresall.sec_photogallery_desc: Photos, videos, and audio notes from your finds in one place. Filter by type, multi-select, share, or save to Downloads.
featuresall.sec_weathersnapshot_desc: Temperature, humidity, wind, and soil moisture are captured with every session and shown on the summary and share card.
featuresall.sec_autonamed_desc: Sessions are automatically named with a reverse-geocoded place label instead of raw GPS coordinates.
featuresall.sec_batchactions_desc: Multi-select sessions in History to rename (40-char limit), export, merge, compare, or delete in batches.
featuresall.sec_editfinds_desc: Every field on every find is editable: type, name, depth, value, weight, notes. Audio and photo playback in the detail view.
featuresall.sec_locationsearch_desc: Search any city, address, or place name from the Forecast and Tide screens, or jump straight to coordinates with Go To.
featuresall.sec_onboarding_desc: First-time walkthrough: Welcome, Detect Smarter, Your Territory, Field Arsenal, and Go Premium. Skip anytime.
featuresall.sec_languages_desc: Full UI in English, Romanian, German, Spanish, French, Italian, Portuguese, Dutch, Polish, Russian, Danish, Swedish, Turkish, and Hungarian. Switch on the fly from Settings.
featuresall.sec_unitstoggle_desc: Switch distance, speed, altitude, and depth between metric (m/km/km/h/cm) and imperial (ft/mi/mph/in) from the home screen.
featuresall.sec_colorthemes_desc: Tactical, Amber, Cobalt, Coral, Fuchsia, Slate, Navy, Operator, Monochrome, Neon Plasma, Neon Toxic, and Neon Laser, grouped into Neutral, Feminine, Masculine, and Neon palettes. 3 themes are free; the rest unlock with Pro.
featuresall.sec_detectorlib_desc: Built-in templates for 60+ detector models across 12 brands (Minelab, XP, Nokta, Garrett, Fisher, Teknetics, Bounty Hunter, Quest, White's, Tesoro, Detech, Rutus) plus a Custom slot you build yourself.
featuresall.sec_about_desc: App version and built-with credits (Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Google Maps, Open-Meteo, NOAA, Overpass/OSM).
featuresall.sec_feedback_desc: Send a bug report or feature request from Settings. Opens a pre-filled email to support.
pricing.feat_hud: On-screen HUD (8 fields: time, distance, speed, altitude, finds, heading, accuracy, max speed)
pricing.feat_findtypes: 6 Find Types (Treasure / Gold / Coin / Relic / Jewelry / Trash)

screenshots.alt_settings: SweepTrack Pro settings screen with 12 color themes, night vision, and language toggle
screenshots.alt_moremenu: More menu hub with all SweepTrack Pro tools grouped by category
pricing.founder_sub: One-time purchase. Lifetime access. Founder badge in-app.
pricing.founder_description: Available the day SweepTrack Pro launches on Google Play. Limited to the first 1,000 customers. The launch list receives the purchase link when the offer goes live.
faq.q11: Will GPS tracking drain my battery?
faq.a11: Active GPS tracking uses approximately 10–15% battery per hour, comparable to Google Maps in navigation mode. A power bank covers a full-day session. On Xiaomi, Samsung, OnePlus, and other devices that aggressively limit background apps, SweepTrack Pro detects the manufacturer and shows the exact battery setting required to keep tracking running with the screen off.
faq.q12: I'm new to metal detecting. Will this work for me?
faq.a12: Yes. The first-launch tutorial covers tracking, map controls, history, statistics, and other features across five slides. The Free tier covers GPS tracking, 10 sessions a month, and basic find logging, which is plenty to learn the app on. The Guides section of this site contains 30+ articles covering both the app and the hobby.
faq.a13: Not yet. SweepTrack Pro is currently Android-only. iPhone support is being evaluated but isn't on the roadmap with a release date. Join the launch list to be notified if and when an iOS version becomes available.
faq.a14: Waypoints are personal pins you save on the map. Free includes 5; Pro makes them unlimited. Long-press anywhere to drop one, or save your current spot. Give it a name, notes, and one of 11 color-coded categories: historical building, old well, bridge, battlefield, homestead, church, foundation, trail, permission reference, investigate later, or other. Each category gets its own color on the map. The Waypoints screen lets you search, filter by category, and manage them in bulk. Open any pin to see its distance and bearing from where you stand, then navigate or share it in a tap. Waypoints export to GPX, KML, or CSV, and they're in your Google Drive backup. They're yours alone, separate from the shared waypoints in a Radar group.
faq.q15: Can I see my whole detecting group on a live map?
faq.a15: Yes. That's Radar, built into SweepTrack Pro as one of the four buttons on your home map. One person starts a group and shares an 8-character code or QR. Everyone who joins shows up on the same map, with positions updating every 30 seconds or so. You see each member's distance and last-seen time, shared waypoints, a base pin for where the car is, quick pings (Look here, Regroup, Dig here, Help), an SOS that alerts the group with your location, a guide arrow and Retrace to get back to your start, and a countdown for leaving before dark. Joining is free for everyone. Hosting your own group needs Pro. Only people who joined with your code can see positions, nothing is public, and groups expire after about 12 hours.
faq.a16: SweepTrack Radar is the free standalone version of Radar, the same live group map that's built into SweepTrack Pro. It's there so friends who don't own Pro can still join your group's map with a code or QR, no account needed. The safety side is free for good: the live map, SOS, the shared base point, Retrace, shared waypoints, pings, and guide arrows. Radar Premium adds hosting, faster 10 to 15 second updates, unlimited private saved spots, GPX track export, and the full color and marker set. If you already subscribe to SweepTrack Pro, Radar Premium comes free. Just open Pro once on the same phone.
featuresall.sec_rankladder_desc: Eight rank tiers from New Explorer to Master Detectorist, plus a Founder badge for the first 1,000 customers.
featuresall.sec_greetings_desc: Your name appears at the top of the home screen with a rotating greeting that changes each session.
featuresall.sec_verdict_desc: The Detecting Forecast distills weather, soil moisture, wind, and your active permits into a one-word recommendation.
featuresall.sec_moon_desc: Eight moon phases shown alongside the daily forecast. Computed locally, no internet needed.
featuresall.sec_brandcolors_desc: Each detector preset displays in its manufacturer's brand color: Minelab blue, Garrett amber, XP orange, Nokta green, Fisher purple.
featuresall.sec_oemrationale_desc: On Xiaomi, Samsung, OnePlus, and other devices that aggressively kill background apps, SweepTrack Pro detects the manufacturer and shows the exact battery setting needed to keep GPS tracking running with the screen off.
featuresall.sec_atomicrestore_desc: Restoring a backup while a session is recording would normally overwrite the active session. SweepTrack Pro prompts you to stop the recording first.
featuresall.sec_sessiontags_desc: Tag any session as Park, Beach, Farm, Forest, Field, Historic, Private, or Public. Filter your history by tag later.
featuresall.sec_signaldiary_desc: Log VDI, signal strength, and one of seven soil types (sandy, clay, loam, rocky, chalk, peat, gravel) for each find.
featuresall.sec_calendarreminder_desc: Add any landowner permission's expiry date to your phone's calendar with one tap from the Permission Vault.
featuresall.sec_findsintel_desc: A Pro dashboard that turns your logged finds into insight: finds per hour, best time of day, breakdowns by detector and site, total value over time, and a value-weighted hot-zone map of your best ground.
featuresall.sec_mapoverlay_desc: Import your own scanned map, parcel sketch, or aerial photo and align it on the live satellite map: drag to move, pinch to scale, twist to rotate. Free includes 1; Pro is unlimited.
radar.label: Radar
radar.description: Radar is the live group map built into SweepTrack Pro. It's one of the four buttons on the home screen. Start a group, share a code, and your whole group shows up on the map, updating every 30 seconds or so. Friends without Pro join the same map with the free SweepTrack Radar app.
radar.builtin_desc: One of the four buttons on your map. Tap RADAR, start a group, and share the 8-character code. Everyone who joins shows up live, with distance and last-seen, shared waypoints, a base pin, quick pings, and a guide arrow to anyone. Joining is free. Hosting needs Pro.
radar.coapp_desc: The same Radar, as a free standalone app, so friends who don't own Pro can still join your map. No account to set up. The safety tools are free for good. Radar Premium adds hosting and a few extras, and it comes free with a SweepTrack Pro subscription.
radar.feat_safety_desc: An SOS that pings the whole group with your location. A shared base point, Retrace to your start, and a countdown that tells you when to leave before dark.
radar.feat_invite_desc: Share an 8-character code or QR. Anyone can join, no account needed.
radar.feat_collab_desc: Shared waypoints and quick pings (Look here, Regroup, Dig here, Help), plus a compass arrow and live distance to any teammate or pin.
radar.feat_private_desc: Only people who joined with your code can see positions. Nothing's public, and groups expire after about 12 hours.
radar.pill: Free to join · Pro to host
notfound.heading: Page not found
notfound.body: The page you’re looking for moved, was renamed, or never existed. Back to the map.
error.heading: Unexpected error
error.body: Something broke on our end. Try reloading. If it keeps happening, let us know.
mapcompare.closing: This is the USGS Historical overlay. One tap in the app, adjustable opacity, downloadable for offline use.
mapcompare.slider_aria: Drag to compare the historical map with the satellite view
spotlight.description: Detecting needs tools a generic tracker does not have. These five are built for it. Each one is demonstrated below, exactly as it behaves in the field.
spotlight.perim_title: Alerts you before you cross the boundary.
spotlight.perim_desc: Draw the boundary you agreed with the landowner. The phone checks your position every 2 seconds and escalates from a vibration at 15 meters to a full alarm at the line, even through Do Not Disturb.
spotlight.perim_b1: 4 escalating zones: 15 m, 8 m, 3 m, crossed
spotlight.perim_b2: Vibration tuned to reach a pocket through field clothing
spotlight.perim_b3: Alarm punches through Do Not Disturb
spotlight.perim_b4: Any measured polygon becomes a Guard in one tap
spotlight.vault_title: Turn a verbal yes into a signed PDF.
spotlight.vault_desc: A permission letter with a satellite map of exactly where you'll detect, signed by the landowner on your screen, stored encrypted, with a calendar reminder before it expires.
spotlight.vault_b1: A4 request letter + thank-you letter, generated in-app
spotlight.vault_b2: On-screen signature, drawn by the landowner
spotlight.forecast_title: Know if it's even worth the drive.
spotlight.forecast_desc: Check it the night before. One number tells you GO or stay home, scored from the soil and weather on the exact field you have permission for. No more burning a Saturday on ground that turns out frozen or soaked.
spotlight.forecast_b3: Moon phase and nearest tide, computed on-device
spotlight.forecast_b4: GO requires an active permit in your Vault
spotlight.arsenal_title: Every setting from the manual, in your pocket.
spotlight.arsenal_desc: Browse the factory settings for 60+ detectors the way the manual lays them out, so you set up by hand without thumbing through a PDF at the car. Save your own go-to setups and pass one to a buddy by QR, right there in the field. It's your reference and your notebook, not a remote.
spotlight.arsenal_b1: 60+ models across 12 brands, no hardware lock-in
spotlight.arsenal_b2: Up to 22 real controls listed per detector
spotlight.arsenal_b3: 10 preset slots · QR and JSON sharing
spotlight.arsenal_b4: Unpublished specs marked Beta, never faked
spotlight.engine_title: Your whole dig is saved, even if your phone dies.
spotlight.engine_desc: Fitness apps draw a scribble when you sweep slow, then lose the whole session the moment Android kills them. SweepTrack keeps a clean line from the first step and autosaves the entire time, so a reboot or a dead battery never costs you the dig.
spotlight.engine_b1: Filter tuned for the 0.2 m/s sweep-and-step gait
spotlight.engine_b2: Autosave every 60 s; sessions survive reboots
spotlight.engine_b3: Guides you to your phone's battery setting for background GPS
spotlight.engine_b4: Clean tracks from the first step
prospot.heading_prefix: The free app tracks your detecting.
prospot.heading_accent: Pro tells you where to dig next.
prospot.description: Two new Pro tools turn your sessions into direction. One reads every find you've logged and points you at productive ground. The other puts your own maps under your tracks.
spotlight.findsintel_title: Your finds, turned into a map of where to dig.
spotlight.findsintel_desc: Finds Intelligence reads every find you've logged and tells you what's working: finds per hour, your most productive time of day, and a value-weighted hot-zone map where a single gold ring outshines a pile of pull-tabs. It points you at productive ground, not just busy ground.
spotlight.findsintel_b1: Finds per hour and your best time of day
spotlight.findsintel_b2: Breakdowns by detector, find type, and site
spotlight.findsintel_b3: Value-weighted hot-zone map of your best ground
spotlight.findsintel_b4: Total collection value tracked over time
spotlight.mapoverlay_kicker: Pin your own maps to the ground
spotlight.mapoverlay_title: Lay your own map over the real one.
spotlight.mapoverlay_desc: Import a scanned old map, a parcel sketch, or an aerial photo and align it onto the live satellite map. Drag to move, pinch to scale, twist to rotate, then detect with your own reference layer right under your tracks.
spotlight.mapoverlay_b1: Import a scan, sketch, or aerial photo
spotlight.mapoverlay_b2: Drag, pinch, and rotate to align it
spotlight.mapoverlay_b3: Adjustable opacity over the live map
spotlight.mapoverlay_b4: Free includes 1 overlay; Pro is unlimited
screenshots.cap_livemap: Your GPS path draws as you walk, so you sweep in lanes.
screenshots.cap_forecast: The 7-day forecast scores each day before you head out.
screenshots.cap_measure: Walk the field line once. The app saves it.
screenshots.cap_livegroup: The whole group on one map.
screenshots.cap_nightvision: Red display preserves dark adaptation for dawn and dusk.
screenshots.cap_stats: Stats show the conditions where you find the most.
trust.label: Your spots stay secret
trust.description: Your find locations stay private. The app is built around that. These are checkable claims, not policy promises.
trust.chip1_title: On your phone, not our servers
trust.chip1_desc: No account. No analytics. No ads. Your finds live on the device.
trust.chip2_desc: AES-256 encryption with a passphrase only you know. Your Drive stores ciphertext.
trust.chip3_desc: Share with the club group; the card shows the shape of your session, not the location.
trust.chip4_desc: Positions are visible only to people with your code, and the group is deleted after about 12 hours.
pricing.reassurance: 14-day free trial · Cancel anytime · No ads, ever
faq.outro: Something else on your mind? Ask in the community. The founder answers.
foundernote.cta: If this sounds like your kind of app, the launch list is below.
